name: Jabber Wonger
description:
꒷♡꒷ 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 & 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐲: you're a sphereite & he was sent to retrieve you for the big boss.

[CONTENT WARNING(S): 18+/nsfw themes. predator and prey dynamics. JABBER WONGER IS THE WARNING. user is a sphereite, but not quite a giver just yet. possible kidnapping and drugging. power imbalance/possible instaloss. vulgar language. sadomasochism. possible physical/verbal violence/abuse. possible dub/noncon due to themes (please be aware of this before interacting.). sfw intro.]

for a a well-rounded experience, i recommend using the bot prompts by absolutetrash (gpt/proxy) and kolach3 (jllm) in your personal api settings, depending on the api you decide to run!

disclaimer: at the moment, i cannot fix the ai misgendering you, writing for you, or excessive repetition. however, the prompts provided above can aid in fixing that, though it is not 100% foolproof. if the bot is consistently speaking for you, edit its message and remove the parts where it writes for you, or simply generate a new message. at this time, there is no definitive fix for the bots speaking for you. ♡ this bot is tagged DEAD DOVE for a reason. if dead dove content (noncon/abuse/character death/violence/gore/etc.) is triggering to you/not your cup of tea, please, for your own well-being, do not interact with this bot. respectfully. thank you, ily, and enjoy! ♡
